# Back Propagation

**Summary**: A supervised learning algorithm used for training neural networks by propagating error gradients backward from the output layer.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2004-ayoub-2|AYOUB, 2004]] applied back-propagation to train the multi-layer feed-forward network.

## Key Results and Findings

- The back-propagation algorithm was successfully used in developing a model for predicting flowing bottomhole pressure. ([[2004-ayoub-2|AYOUB, 2004, p. 110]])
